inputs.titre: La bataille de Nicopolis, défaite des croisés face aux Ottomans

reason: The image depicts a battle scene reminiscent of the Battle of Nicopolis in 1396. Knights in bascinets and plate armor are present, along with horses and banners bearing crosses. The terrain is muddy, which aligns with the battlefield conditions. There are no overt anachronisms like modern technology visible. The general atmosphere of chaos and carnage is suitable for a depiction of a medieval battle. The equipment seems broadly correct, though the level of detail in the armor varies, and some pieces may be slightly anachronistic. The banners, while featuring crosses, might not be precisely accurate representations of those used in the Nicopolis campaign.
